brand.fontFamily: system-ui, -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"

workflow.name: How do I convert a lead into an opportunity and assign it to a team member?
workflow.description: This workflow involves navigating to the Leads list, selecting the specific lead to convert, initiating the conversion process, filling out the required opportunity details, and assigning the new opportunity to a team member. The process leverages Salesforce Lightning's interface for converting leads and managing opportunities.

steps.title: Select Lead
steps.description: Click on the lead's name to open the lead record.

steps.title: Click Convert
steps.description: Click the 'Convert' button in the lead record's action bar to start the conversion process.

steps.title: Opportunity Name
steps.description: Verify or update the name for the new opportunity in the conversion modal.

steps.title: Assign Owner
steps.description: Click the remove icon to clear the current owner and select a new team member if needed.

steps.title: Finalize Conversion
steps.description: Click the 'Convert' button at the bottom of the modal to complete the process.

steps.title: View Opportunity
steps.description: Click on the new opportunity name to view the record and verify the details.
